data.title: Re: Clio Single sign-on
data.description:
From Lee Taylor <lee@stratuslegalconsulting.com>: Hello Refresh,
I am the firm's Clio consultant. Please let me know if you need any
additional information from me.
Below is set up instructions for SSO in Clio.
https://help.clio.com/hc/en-us/articles/41135505613339-Single-Sign-On
Best,
Lee

Lee F. Taylor
Attorney/Founder,
Stratus Legal Consulting
www.stratuslegalconsulting.com
[image: Clio Gold Certified Partner Badge]
dba Lee F. Taylor Law, PLLC



On Wed, Feb 25, 2026 at 3:59?PM Diego Lopez <dlopez@shanklelaw.com> wrote:

> Hello — In anticipation of going live with Clio, we would like to set up
> Single sign-on with Microsoft. Would you please assist us with this process
> next Thursday, March 5th. We can set up a call at 12:00pm or after in which
> I could give you access to our Clio Admin account to enable it for our
> staff. Thank you.
>
>
>
> [image: photo] <http://www.shanklelaw.com>
>

> *Operations Manager, Shankle Law Firm*
>

data.title: ITAD Summit 2026 (IT Asset Disposition) - Secure Your Hotel early at Las Vegas
data.description:
From marketing <marketing@globalexpocapitals.com>: Dear Exhibitors,

We are pleased to offer exclusive hotel booking options for ITAD Summit 2026 (IT Asset Disposition),
taking place in August 4-5, 2026 - The
Bellagio - Las Vegas.

To make your accommodation easier, we’ve selected top-rated
hotels near the venue with exclusive rates:

• The Bellagio – 0.0 miles | 5*| $259 per night instead of
$289

Special
rate with limited availability

(Booking link will be included below)

https://signnow.com/s/4z15BBck 

 • The Palazzo at The
Venetian Resort – 0.9 miles | 5*| $229 per night

(Booking link will be included below)

https://signnow.com/s/ZpICo6Vc 

 All bookings include:

• Instant confirmation by email

• Free changes (names, dates, rooms) up to 15 days before
check-in

• Transparent pricing – no hidden costs

 

Note: 10%
Discount for group reservation (more than 8 rooms)

We recommend booking early to secure the best rate and
preferred location.

Best regards,

Linda Henry

Reservations Team

Email: mailto:marketing@ExhibitsBookingKey.com

data.title: Enhance Outlook Rooms Calendar for Managing Multiple Conference Rooms and Meeting Details
data.description:
Good morning,

I'm hoping someone can help me with a way to select rooms for meetings.  We have multiple conference rooms and multiple users (including our NCWorks team who are not CW employees).  I'm not sure if I am explaining this well, but we need a better way to manage the following spaces:


  *   Conference Room 1
  *   Conference Room 2
  *   Combined Conference Rooms 1 & 2 (there is a retractable wall and for larger meetings, we need to use both)
  *   NextGen Conference Room
  *   Team Room 2
  *   Team Room 3
  *   Charlotte Works Conference Room

If there is a way to add fields, we it would be helpful to add:

  *   Number of attendees
  *   Technology needs
  *   Other

We probably need to have a conversation to better explain this.  I am available today until 3:00.

Thanks!

Aly

Alyson M Ferko
Organizational Support Manager
8601 McAlpine Park Dr|Suite 130|Charlotte, NC  28211
704-206-1344 Direct
aferko@charlotteworks.com<mailto:aferko@charlotteworks.com> | www.charlotteworks.com<http://www.charlotteworks.com/>

[cid:image001.jpg@01DCA70C.60F705C0]

Our Mission: Leading the development of a skilled and in-demand workforce by engaging businesses, aligning community partners, empowering and connecting job seekers to meaningful employment, and fostering inclusive economic growth.
